text:
The Zoo Project Ibiza has established itself as a hallmark of the island's underground music scene since its inception in 2007. Nestled in the former Benimussa Park zoo, this event transforms the abandoned space into a lively, immersive venue that embodies the true spirit of Ibiza’s vibrant nightlife.

Set in the scenic Ses Paisses hills, Benimussa Park offers a unique backdrop with multiple stages such as the iconic Seal Pit, the Tree House stage, and the Mandala Garden. The Seal Pit, once an animal enclosure, now serves as a distinctive amphitheater where DJs perform, surrounded by revelers dressed in animal-themed costumes, creating a surreal and liberating atmosphere.

From its early days, The Zoo Project has championed an underground music ethos, focusing on deep house, tech house, and techno. This dedication to quality music has attracted a loyal following and an impressive lineup of underground talent. Resident DJs such as Defex, Milou, Federico Grazzini, and Davina Moss have become synonymous with the event, delivering high-energy sets that keep the dance floors alive from day to night.

The event also frequently features special guest DJs and live acts. Over the years, the stages of The Zoo Project have been graced by the likes of Dana Ruh, Cassy, Behrouz, and Graham Sahara. These artists, known for their unique sounds and contributions to the underground scene, ensure that the music at The Zoo Project remains fresh, dynamic, and deeply engaging.

The thematic elements of The Zoo Project are a significant part of its appeal. Partygoers often embrace the event’s wild theme by dressing in elaborate animal costumes and using body paint, with on-site makeup artists available to help them transform into their wildest alter-egos. This emphasis on creativity and self-expression fosters a sense of community and freedom that is central to the event's ethos.

Beyond the music, The Zoo Project incorporates a variety of performance art and interactive experiences. Acrobats, dancers, and other performers add a theatrical element to the event, making each visit a multi-sensory adventure. The Mandala Garden provides a space for relaxation and reflection, featuring live music and workshops that offer a holistic counterpoint to the high-energy dance floors. The addition of a Roller Disco in the Mandala Garden adds another layer of nostalgic fun to the mix.

The success of The Zoo Project in Ibiza has led to its expansion beyond the island. The brand has hosted events in cities like London and Liverpool, bringing its unique blend of music, art, and performance to a broader audience. These international events maintain the core elements of the original, ensuring that The Zoo Project remains a beloved and innovative fixture in the global electronic music scene.

For those seeking a truly unique and immersive experience in Ibiza, The Zoo Project offers a blend of nature, creativity, and underground music that captures the island’s true spirit. Its ability to innovate and evolve while staying true to its roots has cemented its place as a cornerstone of Ibiza’s nightlife. The Zoo Project continues to be a testament to the transformative power of music and the enduring allure of the island’s nocturnal charm.
